sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at FROM users WHERE status IN (#{statusList}) AND department_id IN (#{deptList}) AND id NOT IN (#{excludeList}) AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%') AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchEmail}, '%') AND created_at >= #{createdAfter} AND created_at <= #{createdBefore} ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{sortBy} = 'name' THEN name WHEN #{sortBy} = 'date' THEN created_at WHEN #{sortBy} = 'status' THEN status ELSE id END LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageNum}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department, created_at
FROM users
<where>
    <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
        AND status IN
        <foreach collection="statusList" item="s" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{s}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="deptList != null and deptList.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptList" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="excludeList != null and excludeList.size() > 0">
        AND id NOT IN
        <foreach collection="excludeList" item="eid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{eid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="searchName != null">
        AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchName}, '%')
    </if>
    <if test="searchEmail != null">
        AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchEmail}, '%')
    </if>
    <if test="createdAfter != null">
        AND created_at >= #{createdAfter}
    </if>
    <if test="createdBefore != null">
        AND created_at <= #{createdBefore}
    </if>
</where>
<choose>
    <when test="sortBy == 'name'">
        ORDER BY name
    </when>
    <when test="sortBy == 'date'">
        ORDER BY created_at
    </when>
    <when test="sortBy == 'status'">
        ORDER BY status
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        ORDER BY id
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<if test="pageSize != null and pageNum != null">
    LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageNum}
</if>
